title: 6 x Artificial Single Stem White Gerbera with Big Bloom - very dramatic - home garden
features: Dramatic Artificial White Single Stem Gerberas
Total length is approx. 20 inches, but the stem can be cut according to your wishes
The flower has a large eye-catching flower, which is approx. 4" diameter
A great flower for your home, on the grave or at weddings and other occasions
Flowers can be used alone for wedding fish bowls etc
